```{=html}
<!-- Filter_out example showing drop rows where island is Torgersen AND body_mass_g > 4000 -->
<script>
window.FO_TITLE_PRE = 'filter_out(';
window.FO_CONDS_TEXT = ['island == "Torgersen"', 'body_mass_g > 4000'];
window.FO_TITLE_POST = ')';
window.FO_DATA = [
  ['Adelie',    'Torgersen', '3750'],
  ['Adelie',    'Biscoe',    '3800'],
  ['Adelie',    'Dream',     '3300'],
  ['Adelie',    'Torgersen', '4500'],
  ['Adelie',    'Torgersen', 'NA'],
];
window.FO_COLS = ['species', 'island', 'body_mass_g'];
// one base colour per condition (highlight fill + matching code/text shade)
window.FO_COLORS = ['#e8853a', '#c54a4a'];
// one boolean array per column: does that cell satisfy the column's condition?
window.FO_HITS = [
  // island == "Torgersen"
  [true,  false, false, true,  true ],
  // body_mass_g > 4000
  [false, false, false, true,  false],
];
</script>
```

::: {.fo-stage-wrap}
<div id="fo-stage"></div>
:::

[]{.fragment .fo-frag id="fo-cond-1"}
[]{.fragment .fo-frag id="fo-cond-2"}
[]{.fragment .fo-frag id="fo-both"}
[]{.fragment .fo-frag id="fo-arrows"}
